title: Due Scheduling, Monotonic Clocks, Backoff, Jitter, and Pause Policy
description: A ticker polls every feed at one interval, wall-clock jumps duplicate work, failures retry in lockstep, successful publishers never adapt, and paused sources remain due. Learners cumulatively produce deterministic adaptive polling scheduler through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Persist next attempt, last success, failure streak, publisher hints, pause state, and scheduling reason independently from process memory.
Inject wall and monotonic time roles, define inclusive due comparisons, and test forward, backward, and boundary changes.
Apply bounded exponential backoff with deterministic-testable jitter, reset rules, Retry-After, and maximum staleness escalation.
